title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 251.410 - Regional commission may be compensated for unique services
text:
251.410.  Regional commission may be compensated for unique services. — By agreement between the regional planning commission and a local governmental unit, special compensation to the commission for unique and special services provided to such local governmental unit may be arranged.
(L. 1965 2d Ex. Sess. p. 908 § 26)
